_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to analyze Data at Rest and Data in Transit encryption methodologies and assess Data at Rest and Data in Transit polices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-007 (SP, cosine: 0.445), RC-K-002 (RC, cosine: 0.409).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.653). Shared vocabulary: [data, encryption, rest, transit]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analyze, assess, methodologies, polices] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, identity, isolation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.846, R=0.852). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to analyze Data at Rest and Data in Transit encryption methodologies and" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 < STS 0.653 (gap -0.163). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [ability, analyze, assess] and [access, audit, controls] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 26.9%. Shared tokens: [data, encryption, rest, transit]. DCWF-only: [ability, analyze, assess, methodologies, polices]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, controls, identity, isolation, knowledge].
